Interface PotDecorations.Builder

All Superinterfaces:
DataComponentBuilder<PotDecorations>
Enclosing interface:

@Experimental @NonExtendable public static interface PotDecorations.Builder extends DataComponentBuilder<PotDecorations>
Builder for PotDecorations.
